overview.description: Enterprise IT services company delivering digital transformation, AI, and data solutions
overview.description_long: Trask (Trask solutions, a.s.) is a Prague-based global IT services company with 1100+ experts, serving 300+ enterprise clients across Financial Services, Insurance, Automotive, Manufacturing, Energy, and Telco. Founded in 1994 and still founder-owned, Trask delivers end-to-end IT projects including AI agents, intelligent automation, data platforms, cybersecurity, application integration, and cloud services. Gartner has listed Trask as a good example of enterprise AI deployment. Trask was the first company in the Czech Republic to deploy an AI content agent.
overview.tagline: We deliver progressive technology and business solutions

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague in 1994 as an IT services company; founders still own and help manage the company with a long-term outlook. Grew from early banking IT work (Česká spořitelna, ČSOB) to a pan-European digital transformation firm.

key_milestones.event: Early systems integration work for Česká spořitelna branches
First Identity Management implementation in the Czech Republic (for ČSOB)
Delivered world's first online car configurator for ŠKODA Auto, winning multiple best-in-class awards
First company in Czech Republic to deploy AI content agent; Gartner recognition for enterprise AI deployment

awards: Gartner recognition as good example of enterprise AI deployment

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Trask is an IT services integrator with 30 years of deep enterprise relationships and sector-specific expertise (banking, insurance, automotive). Their value is in delivery, integration, and trust with regulated-industry clients — not in a proprietary AI model that could be commoditized.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Enterprise digital transformation and IT services is a large, proven market with steady demand. Trask has 300 long-term clients, 30% YoY revenue growth, and a 30-year track record spanning multiple technology cycles.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Founder-owned private company with 1100+ employees, 30 years of operations, and 300 enterprise clients. No VC dependency; sustained by consulting revenues with no signs of financial distress.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Trask's deep enterprise relationships, long client tenures, domain expertise across regulated industries, and founder-led stability make it resilient. AI enhances rather than threatens their core delivery model.

metadata.notes: Full legal name: Trask solutions, a.s. Website is thetrask.com (trask.cz redirects there). Careers site: wearetrask.com. 30% YoY revenue growth stated on About page. 11 offices in Europe and North America but only Prague HQ confirmed by address.
